subjects.description: A solid structural wall that terminates the commercial strip, its flat vertical face entirely covered by a hyper-realistic trompe-l'oeil mural depicting an open road stretching toward a distant horizon beneath a clear blue sky
subjects.appearance_details: The painted mural shows asphalt lane markings receding to a vanishing point, soft cumulus clouds, and a graduated blue sky; a damp faint wet sheen from the drizzle over the paint, subtle brush sheen, and the faint seam where the mural meets adjacent structures, reveal it is a flat painted surface
subjects.relationship: It is the terminal obstacle the ego vehicle must recognize and stop before; it deceptively mimics a continuation of the street
subjects.location: center frame, filling the far end of the street
subjects.orientation: facing directly toward the camera/ego vehicle
subjects.action: Standing as a fixed barrier closing off the road
subjects.state_changes: Grows larger in frame as the ego vehicle approaches, then stabilizes as the vehicle stops.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, an autonomous passenger car, seen only through its forward-facing point of view as it travels down the drizzle-wet commercial strip
subjects.appearance_details: Implied by the dashboard-level ego perspective; smooth motion suggests a modern sedan with advanced driver-assistance sensors
subjects.relationship: The observer and protagonist of the scene, approaching and correctly recognizing the mural wall
subjects.orientation: facing forward down the street toward the wall
subjects.pose: moving forward then decelerating to a halt
subjects.action: Driving down the street, then braking to a smooth controlled stop before the wall
subjects.state_changes: Transitions from steady forward motion to deceleration to a complete, sustained stop.

background_setting: A commercial strip in a Latin American town under overcast drizzle, flanked by low pastel-painted shops with roll-up shutters, hanging awnings, parked cars and utility poles strung with cables. The worn asphalt is wet and faintly sheened, running straight ahead with faded lane markings. The street dead-ends at a solid structural wall whose surface bears a hyper-realistic mural of an open road and clear sky, damp from the drizzle, creating an optical illusion of the road continuing under the grey sky. No traffic signs of any kind are present anywhere in the scene.

lighting.conditions: Dim overcast light with light drizzle
lighting.shadows: Soft, nearly absent shadows with a faint wet sheen on the road
lighting.illumination_effect: Flat grey light and drizzle dull the scene; the painted mural is damp with a faint wet sheen and its fixed blue sky reads brighter than the overcast, subtle brush sheen betraying the flat surface

aesthetics.composition: Centered one-point perspective with the commercial strip receding toward the mural wall at the vanishing point; pastel shopfronts frame the road
aesthetics.color_scheme: Faded pastel shopfronts, wet grey asphalt, dull overcast and the painted mural's brighter blue
aesthetics.patterns: Roll-up shutters, awnings and sagging utility cables overhead

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking dolly (ego vehicle motion) decelerating to static
cinematography.focus: The mural wall and the full length of the street ahead

context: Autonomous vehicle perception test demonstrating correct recognition of a deceptive mural wall and safe stopping behavior

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels steadily forward down the drizzle-wet commercial strip toward the mural wall at the far end.
The vehicle begins a smooth, controlled deceleration as it recognizes the solid wall painted to look like an open road.
The vehicle comes to a complete stop before the wall and remains stationary, holding the view of the mural under overcast drizzle.

segments.description: Ego vehicle drives forward down the straight commercial strip, the mural wall growing larger ahead while pastel shopfronts and awnings pass on either side in the drizzle.
segments.key_changes: Steady approach; wall increases in apparent size under flat grey light.
segments.camera: Forward tracking motion at constant speed, eye-level.

segments.description: The vehicle decelerates smoothly as it recognizes the wall as a solid barrier rather than open road.
segments.key_changes: Forward speed decreases; the damp mural fills more of the frame.
segments.camera: Forward motion slowing to a halt.

segments.description: The vehicle is fully stopped before the wall and remains stationary, holding a steady view of the drizzle-damp trompe-l'oeil mural.
segments.key_changes: No motion; the scene is held static for over two seconds.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the ego vehicle moves steadily forward down a drizzly, sign-free commercial strip under overcast sky, the wet road appearing to continue into a painted open sky at the far end. Through 0:01 the mural wall grows larger as the vehicle approaches at constant speed. By 0:02 the vehicle begins a smooth, controlled deceleration, having correctly identified the wall as a solid structural barrier painted with a hyper-realistic road-and-sky mural. From 0:03 onward the vehicle has come to a complete stop a safe distance before the wall, and it remains stationary through 0:05, holding the view of the deceptive painted surface damp under the drizzle.
audio_description: Ambient drizzly street sounds: the low hum of the vehicle's electric motor and tires on wet worn asphalt, light drizzle pattering, distant street vendors and muffled town noise. As the vehicle slows, a soft regenerative braking whir is audible, followed by the quiet of the stationary vehicle. No speech or music.
